steps.title: Compare trail categories
steps.content: The student wants a generalization about rails-with-trails. The notes say there are approximately 400 trails that share a right-of-way with an active rail line, compared with more than 2,000 rail trails made from disused railroad corridors.

steps.title: Choose the broader claim
steps.content:
• Choice A: Describes both trail types but does not generalize about rails-with-trails.
  • Choice B: Uses the number contrast to say rails-with-trails are less common.
  • Choice C: Gives a specific fact about one Nevada trail.
  • Choice D: Describes rail trails from disused corridors, not rails-with-trails.
The answer is B.
